programme.desc: Dog Loves Amazing: While trying to solve a puzzle, Dog and Pug end up looking for a minotaur in an ancient maze. After a number of false turns, they reach the centre and find the friendly minotaur. S1 E6

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Handstand: At a party, Bingo is desperate to show off her handstand skills, while Nanna can't find a way to make herself useful. They're both feeling a bit lost, until they find each other. S2 E44

programme.title: In The Night Garden
programme.desc: Upsy Daisy Dances with the Pinky Ponk: Everybody is running about in the garden so much that Makka Pakka can't wash faces.S3 E20

programme.title: My World Kitchen
programme.desc: Dougie's Essex Yule Log (Christmas): Dougie is making a festive yule log. His yummy chocolate recipe with redcurrants is a Christmas classic. He also has a themed table gift for all his friends to enjoy. S4 E15

programme.title: Andy's Wild Adventures
programme.desc: Black Bears: The wild adventurers witness Black Bears climbing trees with their cubs in North America. S1 E5

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: The Harvest Badge: Duggee and the squirrels harvest the seeds they planted some time ago. S2 E29

programme.title: Bluey - Special Trilogy
programme.desc: Ghostbasket - Bluey special trilogy episode 1: Bluey special trilogy episode 1 - Dad is pretending to be an estate agent selling the Grannies' house to Mum, but Janet and Rita do not want to move out.S1 E1

programme.title: Bluey - Special Trilogy
programme.desc: The Sign - Bluey special trilogy episode 2: Bluey special trilogy episode 2 - The Heeler home is up for sale and Bluey's unhappy. S1 E2

programme.title: Bluey - Special Trilogy
programme.desc: Surprise! - Bluey special trilogy episode 3: Bluey special trilogy episode 3 - Bluey and Bingo want dad to play two different games, so dad tries to play both at the same time. S1 E3

programme.title: Go Jetters
programme.desc: White Cliffs of Dover, England: The Go Jetters race to save the White Cliffs of Dover when Glitch digs for classroom chalk S2 E12

programme.title: Dog Loves Books
programme.desc: Dog Loves Magic: Pug wants to perfect his magic tricks, so Dog opens up an adventure to meet the great Hugh Deanie. But Pug's magic allows all the rabbits to escape! S1 E14

programme.title: In The Night Garden
programme.desc: The Ninky Nonk Wants A Kiss: Upsy Daisy kisses everything in the garden. She kisses a tree and a flower. Suddenly the Ninky Nonk stops and will not go. S1 E9

programme.title: Roots & Fruits
programme.desc: Coconut: Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's Coconut getting his moment in the limelight with his sea shanty Oh, the Big Waves - if he manages to overcome a little stage fright. S1 E25

programme.title: Andy's Global Adventures
programme.desc: Chimpanzees: Andy, Jen and Scout head to the forests of the Ivory coast in West Africa on a global adventure to find out how chimpanzees break open African walnuts. S1 E13

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Takeaway: Forced to wait five minutes in front of a restaurant for their takeaway, Bluey and Bingo become restless for entertainment, pushing the very limits of Dad's patience. S1 E14

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Butterflies: Playing 'Butterflies' in the backyard is great fun, until Bluey runs away with Judo leaving Bingo all alone. Now poor Bingo's heartbroken and Bluey needs to make amends. S1 E15

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Yoga Ball: Bingo loves playing with Dad, but sometimes he forgets Bingo is smaller than her sister. Mum teaches Bingo how to use her big girl bark to keep the fun within her limits. S1 E16

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Calypso: At school, Bluey and her friends enjoy various games. Teacher Calypso keeps her charges on track with a wise word and a song... all except the mysterious Pretzel. S1 E17

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: The Doctor: Honey is stuck waiting for Dr Bingo's as the other injuries get seen before her. Receptionist Bluey tells her to be patient, some of these cases are a real pickle! S1 E18

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Copycat: Bluey's having fun copying everything Dad says and does, but the game takes a serious turn when Bluey finds a hurt budgie and they have to make an emergency trip to the vet. S1 E38

programme.desc: Smoochy Kiss: Bluey and Bingo want Dad all to themselves and will not let Mum have a smoochy kiss. S3 E35

programme.title: Hey Duggee

programme.title: Kit & Pup

programme.title: Grace's Amazing Machines

programme.title: Thomas & Friends

programme.title: Dog Loves Books

programme.title: Bluey

programme.title: My World Kitchen

programme.desc: Omelette: Bingo is helping Mum make an omelette for Dad's birthday breakfast. S3 E5
